roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Full-stack development, system design, and coding best practices

questions.question: Tell me about yourself and your experience in software development.
What programming languages are you most comfortable with and why?
Describe a challenging project you worked on and how you overcame obstacles.
How do you approach debugging complex issues in your code?
What strategies do you use for staying current with new technologies?
Explain your experience with system design and architecture.

roles.title: Web Developer
roles.description: Frontend and backend web development, modern frameworks

questions.question: What's the difference between frontend and backend development?
How do you ensure web accessibility in your projects?
Explain the box model in CSS and how it works.
How do you optimize web application performance?
What are your thoughts on modern JavaScript frameworks?
Describe your experience with responsive design and mobile-first approach.
What's the difference between SQL and NoSQL databases?
How do you handle API authentication and authorization?
Explain RESTful API principles and best practices.
How do you ensure database security and prevent SQL injection?
Describe your experience with microservices architecture.
How do you handle database migrations and schema changes?

roles.title: UI/UX Designer
roles.description: User interface design, user experience, design systems

questions.question: What's the difference between UI and UX design?
How do you conduct user research and gather feedback?
Explain the importance of design systems and component libraries.
How do you balance aesthetics with functionality in design?
Describe your experience with accessibility standards (WCAG).
How do you approach creating design prototypes and user testing?

roles.title: Mobile App Developer

questions.question: What's the difference between native and cross-platform development?

Describe your experience with mobile app security best practices.
How do you approach mobile app testing and quality assurance?
What is DevOps and why is it important?
Explain the difference between CI and CD.
How do you implement containerization with Docker?
Describe your experience with infrastructure as code (IaC).
How do you handle monitoring and logging in production systems?
Explain Kubernetes architecture and its benefits.

roles.title: Data Scientist
roles.description: Machine learning, data analysis, statistical modeling

questions.question: What's the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning?
How do you handle missing data in datasets?
Explain the bias-variance tradeoff in machine learning.
How do you evaluate the performance of a machine learning model?
Describe your experience with deep learning and neural networks.
How do you handle feature engineering and selection?

Explain how you conduct user research and gather requirements.
How do you work with engineering teams and stakeholders?
Describe your experience with product metrics and analytics.
